items.title: Ukraine draft law on Chernobyl decommissioning to 2036 approved
items.blurb: The Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine has approved a draft law which extends to 2036 the funding for the State Programme for the Decommissioning of the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant and the Transformation of the Shelter…

items.title: NRC approves Diablo Canyon license renewal, extension

items.title: US agency signals cooperation on Türkiye's SMR investments

items.title: Trilateral cooperation agreement on SMR deployment
items.blurb: The USA, Japan and South Korea have signed a memorandum of cooperation to support trilateral cooperation on accelerating small modular reactor deployments in third countries, with an initial focus on the Indo-Pacific…
